work_package_result.summary: Aligned the milestone schema with the canonical lifecycle and made generated current-milestone test views deterministic for both ACTIVE and QUALIFYING while rejecting zero or multiple current milestones.

passed: just check on implementation commit ac99f50
repository, documentation, planning, generated-view and metadata checks
Rust format, clippy, workspace and documentation tests
desktop, mobile and Node adapter-host TypeScript checks
protocol generation and compatibility checks against origin/main
not_run: owner acceptance is a milestone lifecycle decision after the live demo, not a package test
future milestone planning belongs to M01 refinement

review.method: R1 self-review of the exact implementation diff against the canonical milestone lifecycle, package roots and deterministic generator contract

observability_changes: current-milestone selection failures report whether zero or multiple ACTIVE or QUALIFYING milestones were found
known_limitations: Once M00 is accepted, a later lifecycle change must establish the next ACTIVE or QUALIFYING milestone in the same repository state so generated current-milestone views retain exactly one owner
This package changes planning schema and generated-view semantics only; it does not accept M00 on behalf of the owner
